title: 无 active 状态下完整执行 ownership 与 PR 门禁

sources.reason: N2 gate parity requirement and dependency order.
Host no-active check-ai branch and final PR gate target.
Distributed no-active check-ai branch that must match the host behavior.

riskAssessment.reason: A no-active shortcut can otherwise report local governance success without final diff ownership or PR evidence.

executionDecision.reason: Implement and test complete no-active gate parity without changing product behavior.

preReviewWarnings: The no-active branch must run both local ownership preview and the final PR audit; keep host and distributed Makefiles behaviorally identical.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The no-active branch of the host Makefile runs check-ai-diff-ownership and check-ai-pr after lifecycle checks.
The distributed templates/make/Makefile.ai no-active branch has the same final ownership gates.
Tests prove that both Makefile variants expose the complete no-active gate sequence and preserve the active branch.
The full AI and project quality checks pass without changing release publication behavior.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: When no Work Item is active, make check-ai currently skips the final ownership and PR checks even though the repository can still contain governed or unowned changes.
constraints: Do not change active Work Item behavior.
Do not change archive ownership semantics in this Work Item.
Do not publish or push a release.
intent.rationale: The no-active path must be as strict as the active path so a clean lifecycle state cannot bypass the final repository ownership gate.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: No active Work Item with a clean worktree runs lifecycle, ownership, and PR gates.
No active Work Item with a changed path cannot bypass ownership/PR validation.
The installed Makefile template preserves the same no-active gate sequence.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the automated remediation loop, including the restricted Makefile gate change.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
